# Emerald UI - UI Component Library

A collection of stunning UI components built with Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, GSAP, and Motion.

## Components

**3D Marquee** - A 3D marquee component that rotates images in a 3D space.
undefined/docs/components/3d-marquee

**Animated Dropdown** - A smooth dropdown menu with staggered animations and click-outside behavior.
undefined/docs/components/animated-dropdown

**Animated Input** - An interactive search input with dynamic typing effect.
undefined/docs/components/animated-input

**Animated Number** - A number that animates from 0 to a target value with spring physics.
undefined/docs/components/animated-number

**Buttons** - Explore high quality button components with stunning animations and effects. Dark and Light modes available.
undefined/docs/components/buttons

**Cards** - Explore high quality card components. Dark and Light modes available.
undefined/docs/components/cards

**Color Text Reveal** - Character-by-character color transition animation with accent highlights on scroll
undefined/docs/components/color-text-reveal

**Fancy Text Hover** - Scattered letter hover effect with floating animation
undefined/docs/components/fancy-text-hover

**Flip Card** - A 3D animated card that flips on hover or click, revealing hidden content on the back.
undefined/docs/components/flip-card

**Footer** - A responsive, beautifully designed footer component with a contact section and links.
undefined/docs/components/footer

**Gradient File Input** - A modern file upload input with drag-and-drop support, animated gradient border, and AI-style prompt textarea.
undefined/docs/components/gradient-file-upload

**Hero** - Explore high quality hero components. Dark and Light modes available.
undefined/docs/components/hero

**Image Trail** - Images cascade behind the cursor in a cinematic trail on mouse move
undefined/docs/components/image-trail

**Installation** - Getting started with Emerald UI
undefined/docs/components/index

**Interactive Team** - Interactive team component with hover effects
undefined/docs/components/interactive-team

**Link Hover** - Fancy hover effect on menu items
undefined/docs/components/link-hover

**Magnetic Effect** - Magnetic hover effect that pulls elements towards the cursor
undefined/docs/components/magnetic-effect

**Morphing Highlighter** - SplitText character hover animation and a morphing highlighter bar
undefined/docs/components/morphing-highlighter

**Parallax Image** - Smooth scroll-driven parallax image effect powered by motion/react
undefined/docs/components/parallax-image

**Pricing** - Explore high quality pricing card components. Dark and Light modes available.
undefined/docs/components/pricing

**Scroll Text Reveal** - Word-by-word scroll reveal animation with keyword highlighting and pinned sections
undefined/docs/components/scroll-text-reveal

**Scroll Text Reveal v2** - Line by line clipped scroll reveal animation
undefined/docs/components/scroll-text-reveal-v2

**Sticky Cards Section** - A stunning layout where a massive header text stays pinned behind the scrolling work items.
undefined/docs/components/sticky-cards-section

**Subscribe Input** - An expanding input field for email subscriptions.
undefined/docs/components/subscribe-input

**Text** - Explore high quality text components with stunning animations and effects..
undefined/docs/components/text

**Text Reveal** - Line-by-line text reveal animation with smooth transitions on scroll
undefined/docs/components/text-reveal
